userMessage: Set CH1 to 50mV DC 50ohm for power rail monitoring, CH2 to 1V DC for reference clock. Set trigger on CH1 rising edge 25mV normal mode holdoff 100us. Enable average acquisition 128 waveforms. Add measurements: mean, RMS, pk2pk, high, low, positive overshoot on CH1. Add frequency on CH2. Query all results. Save CH1 waveform as CSV for post-processing and take screenshot.
